info.title: User Back Office Web Service Documentation
info.description: Web service for user registration and management.

post.description: Not any required role for operation
Required role for operation: BO_USERMANAGEMENT_SUPERUSER, BO_USERMANAGEMENT_UPDATE_USER

API resets password of selected user by sending corresponded email

Required role for operation:
  • BO_USERMANAGEMENT_RESETPASSWORD
Supports authentication:
  • Basic <credentials>, where credentials is the Base64 encoding of ID and password joined by a single colon :, CAS login service will be called for the given ID and password for validating credentials.
  • Bearer <token> - which is a Bearer token authentication

API resends consumer registration link by email for selected user. Selected user should have status = preregistered

Required role for operation:
  • BO_USERMANAGEMENT_REGISTER_USER (conditional)
Supports authentication:
  • Basic <credentials>, where credentials is the Base64 encoding of ID and password joined by a single colon :, CAS login service will be called for the given ID and password for validating credentials.
  • Bearer <token> - which is a Bearer token authentication

Consumer should have owner role to be able to remove respective role from another consumer. To remove roles user should have superior role e.g. In order to remove BO_USERMANAGEMENT_REGISTER_USER role user should have BO_USERMANAGEMENT_SUPERUSER role.

Supports authentication:
  • Basic <credentials>, where credentials is the Base64 encoding of ID and password joined by a single colon :, CAS login service will be called for the given ID and password for validating credentials.
  • Bearer <token> - which is a Bearer token authentication

Registers a new user within your organization on the TECS Platform.

**Flow Overview:**
- Calls Useraccountws.Preregister consumer API.
- Generates an email confirmation code and link.
- Sends a confirmation email to the user.

**Input Parameters:**
- **firstName** (optional): User's first name.
- **lastName** (optional): User's last name.
- **email** (mandatory, unique): User's email address.
- **dateOfBirth** (optional): User's date of birth (format: dd.MM.yyyy).
- **street1** (optional): Primary address line.
- **street2** (optional): Secondary address line.
- **city** (optional): User's city.
- **country** (optional): User's country.
- **zip** (optional): User's postal code.
- **salutation** (optional): User's salutation (e.g., Mr., Ms.).
- **phone** (optional): User's phone number.
- **identificationNumber** (optional): User's identification number.
- **passportNumber** (optional): User's passport number.
- **driverLicenceNumber** (optional): User's driver's license number.
- **state** (optional): User's state or region.
- **login** (optional, unique): User login identifier.

**Required Role:**
- BO_USERMANAGEMENT_REGISTER_USER

**Authentication:**
Supports both Basic (Base64 encoded credentials: ID:password) and Bearer token authentication.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Authorization header using either: - Bearer token (e.g., "Bearer <token>") - Basic authentication (e.g., "Basic <Base64 encoded credentials>")

API provides list of users according to filter parameters

Filter parameters:
  • consumeruuid
  • firstname
  • lastname
  • email
  • consumerstatusid (array)
  • Kycstatus (array)
  • userrole.name (array)
  • Registered_date (dateFrom-dateTo)
  • Locked_untill (dateFrom-dateTo)
  • corporeuuid

post.summary: Creates configuration records for new mandator
post.description:
Creates configuration records for new mandator in user management and messaging web services. Registers account for mandator management user.

Required role for operation:
  • BO_USERMANAGEMENT_CREATE_MANDATOR
Supports authentication:
  • Basic <credentials>, where credentials is the Base64 encoding of ID and password joined by a single colon :, CAS login service will be called for the given ID and password for validating credentials.
  • Bearer <token> - which is a Bearer token authentication
Required role for operation: BO_USERMANAGEMENT_MANDATOR_MANAGER

Assigns one or more roles to an existing user (consumer) within your organization on the TECS Platform.

**Pre-requisites:**
- The consumer initiating the role assignment must have an owner role or a superior role.
- For example, to assign the `BO_USERMANAGEMENT_REGISTER_USER` role, the caller must possess the `BO_USERMANAGEMENT_SUPERUSER` role.

**Authentication:**
Supports both Basic authentication (using Base64 encoded credentials) and Bearer token authentication.
